text:
St Mary's Hospital 

Institute of Neurology 

Clinic Date: 17 April 2017 

Dr Ahmed  
Riverside Medical Centre  
Riverside Medical Centre, 14 Barrow Street, London SE1 2AB  

Dear Dr Ahmed,  

James Walker, DOB: 23-11-1985, Hospital No: NHS4820317 NHS No. 9102746351  
12 Brookfield Road, London, SW4 8HT 

Medication: 

Levetiracetam 1 g twice daily. No adverse effects reported. He prefers to continue with this regimen and has not used rescue medication since January. 

He withdrew from Clobazam on 14/Jan. At that time, he had 2 to 4 seizures, one precipitated by illness. He has remained stable without seizures since. This period has included several weeks of increased work-related stress and regular commuting by bicycle without incident, which he reports simply as part of his usual routine. Sleep pattern has been consistent, and there have been no intercurrent infections since the early January episode. 

We discussed general progress, mood and cognition; he describes concentration as good and denies daytime somnolence. He has not noticed warning symptoms, auras, or nocturnal events since mid-January. No emergency attendances or injuries. 

He would like to maintain the current plan and will contact us if there is any change. We will review him in six months or sooner if needed. 

Yours sincerely

entities.text: He withdrew from Clobazam on 14/Jan. At that time, he had 2 to 4 seizures... He has remained stable without seizures since.
He withdrew from Clobazam on 14/Jan. At that time, he had 2 to 4 seizures, one precipitated by illness. He has remained stable without seizures since

check__Seizure Frequency Number.analysis: The letter states: (1) He withdrew from Clobazam on 14/Jan and at that time had "2 to 4" seizures. (2) He has had no seizures since mid-January. (3) Clinic date is 17 April 2017. Therefore, from mid-January to mid-April is approximately 3 months. Because seizure-free status requires at least 6 months, we must calculate frequency over the current period. Total seizures in this roughly 3-month interval are 2 to 4, giving a frequency of 2 to 4 per 3 month.
